A.rationale: Mind map A covers the main topics but over-emphasizes the appendix content (such as the general pipeline and the Gemini-based evaluation experiment), which leads to a severe imbalance. The core contributions of the survey, such as specific model architectures and control strategies, lack sufficient depth. The hierarchy is somewhat disrupted by placing appendix background at the very beginning.

B.rationale: Mind map B perfectly captures the systematic structure of the survey. It covers all main sections (tasks, architectures, control strategies, features, datasets, challenges) with excellent balance and appropriate depth. The nodes are highly concise, and key terminology, model examples, and metrics are accurately retained, reflecting the paper's core content flawlessly.
